subcodes.first_line: O sister of 'Alí! By the effulgent rays of the Sun of inner meanings, before the Divine Throne thou art remembered among the denizens of Paradise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اخت علی قسم باشراقات انوار آفتاب معانی لدی العرش از اهل فردوس مذکوری و در
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
